title: The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on the curly hat pirates arrive within the The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The pile of bones and that Eel just talked! Freaky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wait! Please, tell us! What's going on...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: This place is full of gas! ...Ugh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hose collapsed bodies... Are they all anti-mals?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: idiot! These are all minks! Have you never heard of them!?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Let's just head back to the forest for now! The gas'll get us too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You aren't with THEM, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: I'm Pedro... I need your help.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Please... Duke Inuarashi and Master Nexto- Manushi... Please treat their wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The world is waiting on them!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: The claws of the drought leave gruesome destruction in their wake...

summary: The Curly Hat Pirates Arrive: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
